name: Baofeng Modern International Holdings Company Limited
summary: Baofeng Modern International Holdings Company Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures, sells, and trades in footwear products in the People's Republic of China, the United States, South America, Europe, South East Asia, and internationally. The company operates through Boree Branded Products, Graphene-based Products, and Original Equipment Manufacturer segments. It offers slippers, sandals, and casual footwear under the Boree brand name. The company also manufactures and sells graphene-based ethylene-vinyl acetate foam material, deodorizing and sterilizing chips for air purifiers and air conditioners, and pressure-sensitive sensors. In addition, it produces slippers for branding and resale by others; trades in slippers; and provides management services. Baofeng Modern International Holdings Company Limited was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Quanzhou, the People's Republic of China.
